case_title: DANGILAN LAMBERTO V.P. VS ROSENDIN ELECTRIC, INC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $864.33 FILED BY DANGILAN LAMBERTO V.P. AS TO DEFENDANT ROSENDIN ELECTRIC, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
CERT. RECEIPT TO JAMES TARIO (ROSENDIN ELECTRIC) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANGILAN LAMBERTO V.P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROSENDIN ELECTRIC, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ROSENDIN ELECTRIC, INC RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT DANGILAN LAMBERTO V.P. $654.56 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $654.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
